name: Fresh Pineapple with Rum Cream
recipeInstructions:
For Rum Cream:
1. In the top of a double boiler, blend the egg yolks and sugar.
2. Place over boiling water and whisk until warm to the touch.
3. Add the butter, 1 or 2 pieces at a time, until all is incorporated.
4. When all of the butter has been added, whisk until lightly thickened for 1-2 minutes longer.
5. Remove from heat and cool, whisking occasionally.
6. When cooled, gradually whisk in the rum and fold in about 1/3 cup whipped cream.
To Assemble:
7. Cut off the base and stem of the pineapple, reserving a few small leaves for garnish.
8. Quarter the pineapple lengthwise and remove the skin and core with a sharp knife.
9. Slice each quarter into 1/4-inch-thick slices.
10. Arrange the pineapple slices on chilled plates, overlapping slightly.
11. Gently curl the cantaloupe slices in an "S" shape and place 2 pieces on each plate as garnish.
12. Garnish with reserved pineapple leaves.
13. Spoon some rum cream over the pineapple and serve the remainder of the cream on the side.
